title: EndpointType::Deserialize delegates to from_uri; keep this separation
description: EndpointType's custom Deserialize impl calls Self::from_uri rather than inlining the match arm. from_uri is a public method with its own test coverage; this keeps the serde glue thin (one delegating call) and keeps the parse logic independently reachable from non-serde code. A future contributor might propose inlining the match into deserialize to 'reduce indirection'. That would duplicate the logic or remove the independently-testable entry point. The split is intentional: from_uri is the single authoritative parser; Deserialize is just the serde adapter.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
